import React, { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react"; import "./Home.css"; function useReveal() { useEffect(() => { const els = document.querySelectorAll(".r,.r-l,.r-r"); const io = new IntersectionObserver( entries => entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add("in"); io.unobserve(e.target); } }), { threshold: 0.12 } ); els.forEach(el => io.observe(el)); return () => io.disconnect(); }); } export default function Home({ navigate }) { const [scrollY, setScrollY] = useState(0); useReveal(); useEffect(() => { const fn = () => setScrollY(window.scrollY); window.addEventListener("scroll", fn, { passive: true }); return () => window.removeEventListener("scroll", fn); }, []); const go = (page) => { navigate(page); window.scrollTo(0,0); }; return (
{/* ══ HERO ══ */}
{/* Parallax bg */}

{[ {n:1, t:"contract PaperRegistry {", c:"gold"}, {n:2, t:" struct Paper {", c:"dim"}, {n:3, t:" string ipfsCID;", c:"blue"}, {n:4, t:" address author;", c:"blue"}, {n:5, t:" uint256 timestamp;", c:"blue"}, {n:6, t:" bool exists;", c:"blue"}, {n:7, t:" }", c:"dim"}, {n:8, t:" mapping(string=>Paper) papers;", c:"green"}, {n:9, t:" function submitPaper(string CID) {", c:"gold"}, {n:10, t:" require(!papers[CID].exists);",c:"red"}, {n:11, t:" papers[CID] = Paper({", c:"dim"}, {n:12, t:" author: msg.sender,", c:"teal"}, {n:13, t:" timestamp: block.timestamp", c:"teal"}, {n:14, t:" });", c:"dim"}, {n:15, t:" }", c:"dim"}, {n:16, t:"}", c:"gold"}, ].map(({n,t,c}) => (
{n} {t}
))}
{/* Main headline */}
Blockchain · IPFS · Solidity · Academic Priority

Establish Your Research Priority.

The world's first decentralised academic authorship system. Your paper, timestamped forever — no institution, no intermediary.

{/* Stats bar */}

{/* ══ PROBLEM STATEMENT ══ */}
TRUST
LESS
The Problem

Science
deserves
certainty.

{[{v:"100%",l:"Tamper-proof"},{v:"∞",l:"Permanent"},{v:"0",l:"Trusted parties needed"}].map(({v,l})=>(
{v}
{l}
))}

Academic priority disputes are as old as science. When two researchers independently discover the same thing, the community needs an objective, tamper-proof record of who arrived first.

Today's systems depend on centralised servers whose records can be altered, delayed, or destroyed. Journal timestamps can be manipulated. Institutional repositories are only as trustworthy as their operators.

Proof of Precedence changes this by combining{" "} IPFS content addressing with an{" "} Ethereum smart contract — a permanent, public record that requires no trust in any single institution.

"The blockchain is immutable. The timestamp is real. The authorship is cryptographic. This is certainty.
{/* ══ PREVIEW CARDS ══ */}
EXPLORE
Discover More

Everything you need to know.

See the actual smart contract code and understand every component.", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1639322537228-f710d846310a?w=800&q=80", word: "CODE", accent: "#3d7fff", }, { page: "app", num: "03", title: "Launch App", desc: "Register your paper right now. Upload to IPFS, submit to the blockchain, and receive cryptographic proof of precedence.", img: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1451187580459-43490279c0fa?w=800&q=80", word: "BUILD", accent: "#1a6b5a", }, ].map(({page,num,title,desc,img,word,accent}) => (
